title: agropyron × flexuosum
intro: Agropyron × flexuosum, also known as a hybrid of Agropyron cristatum and Elymus elongatus, is a type of grass or wild grass that belongs to the wheat family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Agropyron × flexuosum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. Agropyron × flexuosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
